Quality Commission

Quality and Strategy Development Commission

The

Quality and Strategy Development Commission

of Kadir Has University is a commission that operates to integrate all processes related to the university’s quality assurance into the institutional structure and to ensure continuous improvement. The main duties of the commission include ensuring the implementation of quality assurance processes (such as evaluating and improving the quality of education, research activities, and administrative services in line with the university’s strategic plan and objectives, establishing internal and external quality assurance systems, determining institutional indicators, monitoring the quality system, carrying out activities in accordance with the procedures and principles set by the Higher Education Quality Council (YÖKAK), and submitting the results to the Senate for approval) within the framework determined by the Academic Council, strengthening the university’s quality management system, and coordinating internal evaluation processes.
